intro: Welcome to BunOS, the environment for bunny hackers.
Let me show you how it works!
files: The files button at the bottom right shows all the files on your computer.
files_folder: Try out the different folders. For now they do nothing!
tools: This is your toolkit. For now you can only see the crypto tool.
clear_button: If too much is shown on screen, press the clear button.
tasks: The last thing I want you to know
Is how tasks work in this environment
next_tasks: Look! Something appeared in the right corner.
last_section: Let me show you how cryptography works.
Slow and steady wins the race right?
crypto_task: What kind of tool should you use for solving messages like this?
Open the crypto tool I showed you earlier.
1. Copy the text you want to decipher
2. Paste it in the INPUT area in Message Solver.
3. Enter a number (Use arrows UP / DOWN)
crypto_done: NICE! You solved the crypto task.
steg_tool_info: Using bunny magic, you should now have a new tool in your toolkit!
Press the stegano tool in the toolkit, I'll show you how to use it later.
This tool can be used for steganography.
steg_task_info: Look, a new task has appeared!
Press the tasks button on the bottom right.
steg_task: Open the file explorer I showed you earlier.
1. See if you find the Saint Sofelin image.
by entering the image filepath in metaExtract
steg_done: Now I will teach you about web exploitation.
web_tool_info: Using magic you should now have a new web exploit tool!
My fairy dust is running low...
Press the web tool in the toolkit, I'll show you how to use it later.
browser_info: What's the fun in cracking usernames and passwords without trying them??
Press the Boogle browser to the right of the toolkit
browser_pressed: Here you can test login credentials after cracking them using the web tool.
Some missions only require the password, whille harder missions require finding usernames too.
web_task_info: Now, are you ready to use what you've learned?
web_task: Open the password breaker tool I showed you earlier.
3. Choose the username or password list you want to test.
5. Now, the fun part! Open the Boogle browser and enter the URL: https://kapibara.com
6. Enter the password you found, and enter the flag into the task.
finished: NICE! Now you are a certified hacker.
Press next to start the main game.
